topics.title: American Idol Finale Analysis
topics.summary: The studio discusses the performances, contestants, and celebrity appearances during the American Idol finale.

topics.title: American Idol and Satellite Radio Market
topics.summary: The studio discusses the results of American Idol, the declining market share of XM satellite radio due to competition from Sirius, and a series of prank calls involving Catherine McPhee.

topics.title: American Idol and Racial Stereotypes
topics.summary: The studio explores the validity of racial stereotypes, a prank call from Sal Governale regarding his controversial remarks, and various moments from the American Idol competition.

topics.title: American Idol Discussion and Racial Commentary
topics.summary: The studio features a discussion regarding American Idol contestants, followed by a segment involving racially charged remarks and personal anecdotes.

topics.title: Controversial Remarks and HR Intervention
topics.summary: The studio records a segment involving an employee's offensive remarks leading to a required apology and internal discussion regarding professional conduct.

topics.title: Hostel Experiences and Studio Gossip
topics.summary: The studio features discussions regarding personal anecdotes about vacationing at Hedonism, a tribute to Dan the Song Parody Man, and internal jokes about technical staff.

topics.title: Woman Describes Sexual Encounter With Stepson
topics.summary: The studio hosts a caller named Sue who describes an unplanned sexual encounter with her 19-year-old stepson in a hot tub while her husband was present.

topics.title: Incestuous Relationship and Sexual Deviance
topics.summary: The show features a woman recounting an affair with her stepson while her husband listened, followed by a segment detailing a domestic violence case involving two friends.

topics.title: Dixie Chicks Controversy and Career
topics.summary: The studio hosts a discussion with the Dixie Chicks regarding their musical success, personal lives as parents, and the backlash they faced for speaking out against the Iraq War.

topics.title: Dixie Chicks Controversy and Career
topics.summary: The studio explores the Dixie Chicks' experiences with corporate blacklisting, their stance on the Iraq War, and personal anecdotes regarding their life as public figures.

topics.title: Dixie Chicks Radio Relations and Personal Stories
topics.summary: The show features the Dixie Chicks discussing their refusal to apologize to radio stations for their political stances, their new single's production strategy, and personal anecdotes regarding tour life.

topics.title: Dixie Chicks Interview
topics.summary: The studio hosts an interview with the Dixie Chicks, where they discuss their career, personal lives, and the impact of corporate radio decisions.

topics.title: Prank Calls and Alien Translations
topics.summary: The show features a discussion regarding failed prank calls to public access television, a segment on alien-related content from Riley Martin, and the airing of various comedic sketches.

topics.title: Radio Show News and Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a variety of topics including listener calls regarding controversial remarks, news updates on military personnel and celebrity appearances, and commentary on American Idol ratings.

topics.title: CBS Lawsuit Settlement and Cultural Commentary
topics.summary: The studio discusses a reported settlement between CBS and Howard Stern, a list of rock songs favored by conservatives, and various news stories including a nightclub shooting and an incident involving the Dixie Chicks.

topics.title: American Idol and Celebrity Culture
topics.summary: The studio discusses the recent season of American Idol, celebrity appearances by figures like Prince and Taylor Hicks, and various pop culture topics including Ryan Seacrest's media presence and a wager regarding Bruce Springsteen.

topics.title: Celebrity News and Local Events
topics.summary: The studio discusses celebrity news involving Keith Urban, Nicole Kidman, and Jennifer Aniston before transitioning to a list of upcoming local performances.
